narrative: This store scores 87.0/100 (Grade A) on AI representation quality across 33 products. AI agents are missing approximately 21% of potential search traffic due to weak metadata signals (retrieval score: 78.5/100 — HIGH). The single highest-ROI fix is 'SKU_MISSING' — affects 33/33 products and is the most common reason AI agents skip this store's catalogue. Fixing the top 3 issues store-wide would significantly improve AI discoverability without requiring any new products or design changes.

issues.message: Store features a diverse selection from 13 brands. AI agents value curated marketplaces—ensure your 'About Us' tells your curator story.

competitiveContext.benchmarkSource: Calibrated from 200+ Indian Shopify stores (everyday essentials segment)
